createOrder.capturedSql: INSERT INTO orders(customer_id, status, total_amount) VALUES (?, 'PENDING', 0) RETURNING id

searchProductsByCategory.capturedSql: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, p.stock_quantity, p.rating,   (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.product_id = p.id) AS total_orders,   (SELECT AVG(oi2.quantity) FROM order_items oi2 WHERE oi2.product_id = p.id) AS avg_qty,   (SELECT MAX(o.created_at) FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi3 ON oi3.order_id = o.id WHERE oi3.product_id = p.id) AS last_order FROM products p WHERE active = true AND category = ? ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 10

updateInventory.capturedSql: UPDATE products SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + ? WHERE id = ?

getProductDetail.capturedSql: SELECT id, name, category, price, stock_quantity, rating, active FROM products WHERE id = ?

checkInventory.capturedSql: SELECT stock_quantity FROM products WHERE id = ?
